Add rate limiting, OrderBook matching, persistent volume, CI improvements

Security & Middleware:
- Implement per-IP rate limiting (100 req/min) with auto-cleanup
- Add request logging middleware (method, path, status, latency)
- Extract client IP from Fly-Client-IP / X-Forwarded-For headers
- Wire middleware into axum router

OrderBook:
- Implement price-time priority matching (bid >= ask crossing)
- Handle partial fills with U256 arithmetic
- Add 4 tests: no-crossing, exact-crossing, partial-fill, time-priority

Infrastructure:
- Add Fly.io persistent volume (1GB) for SQLite database
- DB_PATH configurable via environment variable
- Scale to 1 machine for volume mount compatibility
- Expand CORS: localhost:5173, aridex.io, ari.exchange

CI:
- Add clippy lint check with -D warnings
- Add TypeScript typecheck (tsc --noEmit) to frontend job
- Add forge build step before forge test
- Enable npm cache for faster builds

Trader Stats:
- Auto-update trader_stats on intent submission for social leaderboard

commit.message:
Add task generation guardrails: depth limit, daily cap, pending cap

Prevents infinite follow-up recursion that burned through API rate limits.
- MAX_TASK_DEPTH=1: follow-ups can't spawn more follow-ups
- DAILY_TASK_CAP=20: max 20 auto-generated tasks per day
- PENDING_TASK_CAP=30: stop if 30+ tasks already queued
- Improved prompt to reject meta-tasks and micro-optimizations
- Added depth column to tasks table for tracking generations

fix: mention dropdown light mode + avatar fallback + sort by activity - Theme-aware colors for @mention dropdown (background, border, text) - Avatar uses with colored initial fallback on load failure - Sort mention list by lastActiveAt descending (most active first) Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6

fix: remove ErrorBoundary wrapper div breaking Mapbox GL map

container's height calculation, causing a blank map. Revert to
returning children directly.

fix: Phase 6 - .gitignore強化・セッション統一・残存セキュリティ修正

.gitignore強化:
- OS生成ファイル(.DS_Store, Thumbs.db等)追加
- IDE/エディタ(.vscode, .idea等)追加
- 依存関係(vendor/, node_modules/)追加
- バックアップ・一時ファイル追加
- .claude/ディレクトリ追加

- 単独ファイル: セキュアCookie設定をsession_start前に追加(13件)

残存セキュリティ修正:
- convert_to_ride.php: CSRF検証追加
- calendar/index.php: addslashes()→json_encode()に置換
- index.php: タイムアウトメッセージ表示対応

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Detect media failures via network events, not just DOM MediaError

The previous DOM-only check (video.error) missed cases where media
network requests fail or return HTTP errors before the browser sets
MediaError. Now monitors Playwright requestfailed and response events
for media resource types and media file extensions (.mp4, .webm, .m3u8,
etc.), in addition to the DOM check. Logs the specific failure reason
(network error text or HTTP status) for debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Overhaul aurora to match real photo references

- Full-viewport buffer: aurora fills the entire sky, fades only at
  sides and bottom via linear gradient masks (open at top like a real sky)
- Stars: 260 tiny white dots visible through the aurora
- Base horizon crimson/orange fire glow drawn on main canvas beneath aurora
- Canvas shadowBlur (10px) on curtain rays for luminous glow quality
- Taller rays (1.80× maxH) to fill more sky like Image 3
- Three noise layers per band for grand roll + fine ripple + slow drift
- Sweeping brightness waves in both directions for dynamic flaring
- All content guaranteed within 100vw × 100vh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Redesign dashboard: unified action queue, signal trend chart, entertainment signals

Replace SignalIntelligence with two focused components:
- ActionQueue: merges commitments + violations sorted by urgency with inline actions
- SignalFeed: stacked bar trend chart (weekly/period/year views) + filtered signal feed

Add entertainment as a new signal type with DB migration, AI extraction prompt,
and pink-coded UI treatment across chart and feed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

最终合并：将所有API端点减少到4个以符合Vercel限制

问题：Vercel Hobby计划限制最多12个Serverless Functions
当前有13个API文件，需要减少到12个以下

解决方案：将所有嵌套API目录合并为根级单文件

变更：
- 删除 api/auth/ (3个文件) → 创建 api/auth.js
- 删除 api/users/ (8个文件) → 创建 api/users.js
- 删除 api/settings/ (1个文件) → 创建 api/settings.js
- 保留 api/countries.js (已合并)

最终API结构（4个文件）：
1. api/auth.js - 处理登录、登出、验证、初始化、确保用户
2. api/users.js - 处理用户管理（列表、创建、删除、激活、密码）
3. api/settings.js - 处理用户设置
4. api/countries.js - 处理国家管理

所有API使用路径解析识别操作：
- /api/auth/login → auth.js 解析 "login"
- /api/users/create → users.js 解析 "create"
- /api/settings → settings.js 直接处理

四个默认国家保护机制保持不变。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(issues): add create issue dialog with team-scoped dropdowns

Add a Linear-style modal dialog for creating issues from list and board
views. The dialog includes team selector, searchable dropdowns for
status, priority, assignee, labels (with group support), and project,
plus natural language due date parsing via chrono-node.

Backend changes:
- Add dueDate field to issues schema
- Refactor POST /api/issues to auto-generate identifier, number, and
  resolve workspace/creator from context
- Add GET /api/teams/by-workspace, GET /api/teams/:id/members,
  GET /api/projects/by-team endpoints
- Support optional teamId filter on GET /api/labels/issues

Frontend changes:
- Add create-issue-dialog with badge-triggered Popover+Command pickers
- Add TanStack Query hooks for teams, members, labels, and projects
- Add QueryProvider to main layout
- Integrate "+" trigger buttons in list and board views
- Install shadcn dialog, command, popover, textarea, input-group

commit.message:
Final security hardening: SSRF protection, auth error cleanup, dead code removal

- SEC-018: Remove exception details from auth signup/login error responses
- SEC-019: Fix refresh token error to use generic Italian message
- SEC-020: Add SSRF protection for user-supplied RSS feed URLs
  - Validates scheme (http/https only)
  - Blocks metadata endpoints (169.254.169.254, metadata.google.internal)
  - Blocks private/loopback/link-local IPs
  - DNS resolution check to prevent hostname-based SSRF
- SEC-024: Validate format_type against allowlist in feedback submission
- BUG-023: Remove dead _get_feedback_context function (latent injection risk)
- BUG-025: Remove no-op startup prompt snapshot (fails without request context)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix 9 audit issues: timezone, mobile overflow, validation, UX

1. Date timezone: replace 34 toISOString().split('T')[0] with localDate()
   helper to prevent dates showing tomorrow after 7PM EST
2. Mobile left-clipping: add overflow-x:hidden, hide sync labels on small screens
3. Subcategory normalization: extend normalizeAllCategories() to process subcategories
4. Stock stepper debounce: add 300ms debounced save to prevent rapid-fire writes
5. Surface background failures: add toast notifications to silent catch blocks
   in store.js, reports.js, whatnot-show.js, main.js
6. Auto-apply fee estimate: Record Sale now auto-fills fees when platform selected
7. Bulk price NaN guard: replace parseFloat||0 with proper isNaN validation
8. API call timeouts: add 10s AbortController timeouts to UPCitemdb fetch calls
9. Inline price edit indicator: add green flash on save confirmation

commit.message:
fix: ASK streaming sources variable scoping bug — session 51

Python scoping: `sources` assigned inside `generate()` shadowed the outer
filter variable, causing UnboundLocalError before assignment. Renamed the
extracted-sources variable to `source_refs` on lines 484, 494, 541 to
eliminate the conflict. Outer `sources` (filter list) untouched.

commit.message:
Fix OOM crash: limit MLX Metal cache, stream WAV writes, add increased-memory-limit entitlement

- Set MLX Memory.cacheLimit to 20MB to prevent unbounded Metal buffer caching (was ~420MB spike during inference)

- Clear MLX cache between sentence chunks

- Stream WAV output via FileHandle instead of accumulating all samples in memory

- Drop unused voice embeddings after selecting the active voice

- Unload model after generation completes

- Add os.log memory diagnostics at each pipeline stage

- Add com.apple.developer.kernel.increased-memory-limit entitlement

- index.php: session_regenerate_id()でセッション固定攻撃防止
- index.php: $_SESSION['user_role']をログイン時に設定
- session_check.php: 30分セッションタイムアウト実装

セキュリティヘッダー:

  Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, HTTPS強制

- Remove "source 분해" debug text from revenue cards and chart
- Clean up data quality warning to use user-friendly language

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix critical matching bugs: prevent wrong-person approval + duplicate comprobantes

- Raise auto-approve confidence threshold from 85% to 90% (fuzzy matches go to manual review)
- Add transaction dedup: one Palta tx can only match ONE payment (prevents double-approval)
- Add batch-level dedup: same tx can't be used for multiple payments in same poll cycle
- Add failsafe: re-check tx.matched before approving (prevents race conditions)
- Add OCR-level duplicate detection: same sender + same amount = blocked
- Increase Palta transaction fetch limit: 3→5 pages (up to 250 transactions)
- Add getPaltaTransactionById helper to data service

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Grid IQ flow restructuring: unified pre-sale and post-sale flows

Restructures Grid IQ from disconnected tools into a guided two-stage flow
matching the product spec. Stage 1 (pre-sale) creates a multi-herd consignment
with per-category processor vs saleyard comparison. Stage 2 (post-sale) links
actual kill sheets with auto-matching, runs post-kill analysis, and confirms
sale with adjustable herd allocations.

New files:
- pre-sale-actions.ts: Multi-herd consignment + per-allocation analysis engine
- post-sale-actions.ts: Post-kill analysis + sale confirmation with head deduction
- pre-sale-flow.tsx: 3-step guided pre-sale component
- post-sale-flow.tsx: 3-step guided post-sale component with kill sheet auto-match
- category-breakdown.tsx: Per-category comparison table for multi-herd analyses
- prediction-accuracy.tsx: Pre-sale estimate vs actual outcome comparison
- consignments/[id]/post-sale/page.tsx: Post-sale flow entry page
- docs/GRID-IQ-FLOW-SPEC.md: Complete product flow specification

Modified files:
- analyse/page.tsx: Uses PreSaleFlow instead of AnalysisForm
- analysis/[id]/page.tsx: Category breakdown, prediction accuracy, consignment link
- consignments/[id]/page.tsx: Linked analyses, post-sale flow entry button
- consignments/actions.ts: Added updateConsignment for editable pending consignments
- page.tsx: Pending consignments section with action-needed highlighting

feat: meshd Phase A — Go binary replaces mesh-status.py for observability

Single 17MB binary (pure Go + modernc.org/sqlite, BSD license) serves the
full dashboard with embedded templates and static assets via go:embed.

Ports all data collection from mesh-status.py to Go: trust budget, gates,
transport messages, session-threaded view, peer states via git show, TODO

and schedule/cron detection.

/health, /replays/{file}, /replays/remote/{remote}/{file}

Backward-compatible JSON API preserves compositor integration.

- Add 6 slide layout types (two-column, stats, quote, features, highlight, default) via data-layout attributes in system prompt and CSS
- Fix classic style bug where ${c.primary} was never interpolated (single quotes → template literals)

Co-authored-by: Derik J Bannister <derikbannister9@Deriks-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix road/settlement placement on mobile, larger touch targets

- Root cause: touch pan handlers were intercepting taps on buildable spots,
  preventing onClick from firing during gameplay (setup worked because
  no buildingMode check was needed)
- Fix: add 'buildable-spot' class to all interactive placement elements;
  skip pan initiation when touching a buildable spot
- Add onPointerDown stopPropagation on all buildable spots and robber targets
- Road spots now use invisible rect hit area (28px wide) behind the visible
  line, making them much easier to tap on mobile
- Settlement/city circle hit targets enlarged (r=16/18, up from 13/16)
- Only call preventDefault in touchMove when actually panning (not on taps)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Google Classroom grade sync with idempotent push, section courseId support, and daily cron

- Idempotent sync: matches existing assignments by title, only patches changed grades
- Section courseId support: loads student progress across all migratedFrom sections
- Grade formula fix: unanswered questions count as 0 (percentage of total)
- Only syncs visible lessons with due dates on or before today
- Due date passthrough with fallback if Google rejects past dates
- Sync status: pending count badge + last synced timestamp on dashboard
- OAuth refresh token flow for headless cron (classroom-auth.cjs)
- Headless sync script for scheduled runs (classroom-sync.cjs)
- Backfill script for bias detective progress data
- Fix React #130 crash on Battleship activity (null component guard)
- Fix Data Labeling Lab grade persistence
- Gitignore .env.* and .classroom-token.json

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- New generate_institutions_map.py extracts 19 map-relevant fields

- useMapData now loads slim file for map, full file for Campuses table
- Fix Python 3.9 compat: remove 3.10+ type union hints from shared.py

Frontend tests (Vitest + React Testing Library):
- tableHelpers: 60+ tests for formatters, column factories, sort,
  CSV export, grouping, footer summaries, PVI parsing
- campusColors: Mapbox expression structure, color map completeness
- useMapData: data loading, GeoJSON conversion, error handling
- App: routing, 404 redirect, document title, subView validation
- ErrorBoundary: error catch, retry/remount, resetKey
- SubNav: per-page views, active state, navigation
- Toast: accessibility, auto-dismiss, cleanup

after setting the Y baseline, ensuring no metro containers overlap by

commit.message:
fix: medium/low findings from 4 specialized re-reviews (18 fixes)

Security: fail-fast credentials in docker-compose (:? syntax), generic
403 message hides tenant status, collection name regex validation,
X-Forwarded-For support for brute-force protection, MCP exception
messages sanitized, reserved tenant ID rejection, CORS wildcard blocked
in production
Performance: chunked-encoding size limit enforcement, outbox stuck
recovery partial index, OrderedDict LRU for collections (10% eviction),
dlq_async LIMIT 1000, rate_limit_log + response_cache_meta indexes

integration, MCP version aligned to 6.1.0
Vector: delete_collection under _collection_lock

commit.message:
refactor: consolidate duplicated CI publish logic into composite actions (#60)

* fix: use pnpm.cmd on Windows for mod discovery and command execution

On Windows, pnpm is installed as a batch script (pnpm.cmd), which
Rust's std::process::Command does not resolve automatically. Added
pnpm_program() helper that returns the correct executable name per
platform.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove canonicalize() for service script paths on Windows

canonicalize() on Windows produces extended-length paths with the \?\
prefix (e.g. \?\C:\Users\...). Node.js cannot handle this prefix and
fails with EISDIR: illegal operation on a directory, lstat 'C:'.

Since pnpm ls --parseable already returns absolute paths, path.join()
is sufficient. The existence check in load.rs handles missing files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

formatting the value into a TOML string literal. This avoids backslash

escape `\U`).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: call early_exit_if_subprocess() before Bevy init on Windows

CEF subprocesses (renderer, GPU, utility) re-execute the main binary.
Previously, subprocess detection ran inside MessageLoopPlugin::build(),
after DefaultPlugins had already created windows and GPU contexts. This
caused separate browser windows, GPU crashes, and cef_initialize failures
on Windows MSI installs. Move the call to the very top of main() so
subprocesses exit immediately.

Also includes: resolve_asset_path() for cross-platform asset resolution,
root_cache_path configuration for CEF data, ExitCondition::DontExit,
setup_panic_hook with Windows MessageBox, and windows_subsystem attribute.

* fix: hide windows from taskbar and activate on startup (Windows)

Use skip_taskbar:true (ITaskbarList::DeleteTab) for timing-safe taskbar
hiding and visible:false to defer window display until WS_EX_TOOLWINDOW
is applied. Rename NeedsTaskbarHide → NeedsActivation and
hide_windows_from_taskbar → activate_windows to reflect the new
two-step flow: apply WS_EX_TOOLWINDOW for ALT+TAB hiding, then set
Window.visible=true so winit shows via SW_SHOWNOACTIVATE (no focus theft).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove visible:false to fix window content not rendering (Windows)

Creating windows with visible:false prevented wgpu from properly
initializing the render surface, causing blank windows. Use only
skip_taskbar:true for taskbar hiding, which winit handles via
ITaskbarList::DeleteTab without affecting the rendering pipeline.

* fix: convert physical pixel coords to logical coords for high-DPI Windows displays

Windows APIs (EnumDisplayMonitors, GetWindowRect) return physical pixel
coordinates which must be divided by the DPI scale factor for correct
layout on high-DPI displays (e.g. 150% scaling). Also fixes swapped
Y-axis coordinates in obtain_window_rect().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: implement Windows mod process lifecycle management

Add Job Object-based process tree containment and graceful shutdown
for mod services on Windows, closing four gaps in Windows parity:

1. Job Objects with KILL_ON_JOB_CLOSE automatically terminate the
   entire process tree (including tsx grandchildren) when the engine
   crashes — eliminates stale process cleanup for the happy path.

2. Graceful shutdown sends CTRL_BREAK_EVENT before forceful
   TerminateJobObject, mirroring the Unix SIGTERM→SIGKILL pattern.

3. kill_if_mod_service() is now functional on Windows, verifying
   executable identity via QueryFullProcessImageNameW before
   terminating stale PIDs (prevents false-positive kills).

4. Two-layer defense-in-depth: Job Objects (primary) + PID file
   (fallback for when AssignProcessToJobObject fails in CI/IDE
   environments with incompatible job nesting).

Design ratified unanimously by 4-member discussion board with
Codex audit. See docs/plans/ for the full design document.
